title: Midnight Pork Belly Bake
description: A savory, slow-cooked pork belly dish with a creamy sauce, perfect for a cold evening. This traditional British recipe is a must-try for pork lovers.
instructions: Cut the pork belly into a large piece and season with salt and pepper.
Heat the oil in a large oven-safe pan over medium heat. Sear the pork belly until browned on all sides.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, then add the minced garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the apple cider vinegar, honey, and creamy tomato sauce. Stir to combine.
Transfer the pan to the preheated oven and bake for 2 1/2 hours, or until the pork is tender and the sauce has thickened.
Remove the pan from the oven and sprinkle with chopped thyme. Serve hot, garnished with additional thyme if desired.
